title: Claude Fable 5 sets a fluid simulation to Beethoven
summary: Claude Fable 5 generated code for a fluid simulation synchronized to a Beethoven EDM remix, which Claude also produced using code. This demonstrates the model's ability to coordinate procedural generation across physics simulation and audio synthesis without prior exposure to music.
writeup: The video shows Claude Fable 5 generating code for a fluid simulation synchronized to a Beethoven EDM remix that the model also produced through code. It illustrates coordination of procedural generation across two domains at once: physics simulation and audio synthesis. The stated takeaway is that the model handled both without prior exposure to music.
